Article Day-wise Trend

Select articles + city filter above, then view daily IGCC count & incidence% trend
Sources — IGCC _Daily Summary → Cat.inc (city × date FnV ORDERS_TOTAL + ORDERS_IGCC) drives all PAN/city numbers; Item incidences (item × city × date) drives the item table. PAN/City IGCC% = Σ ORDERS_IGCC ÷ Σ ORDERS_TOTAL — the official orders-based incidence. Target 0.99%.
Note — Cat.inc spans 13 Jun–14 Jul; Item incidences spans 03 Jul–13 Jul — for days outside the item window the item table is empty while PAN/city numbers still show. Export buttons download the current filtered view as CSV.
RCA Bucket — dominant root-cause reason per row from the Daily RCA summary (01 Jul–11 Jul), shown with its % share of that row's RCA-tagged IGCC. Aggregated over the full RCA window (not affected by the day filter). PODs use their city's RCA (the source has no store-level RCA).
